# AI Desktop Assistant - Custom Instructions

Voice-first AI assistant with speaker verification, hidden logging, and secure execution.

## Project Configuration
- Type: Node.js + Frontend
- Features: Voice processing, speaker verification, command execution, backend logging
- Security: Owner-only control, password fallback, dangerous command blocking
